title: MOBILE CLINIC - 211info
text: MOBILE CLINIC MOBILE CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides mobile health care services including vaccinations, lab testing, wellness visits, medication assistance, women's health services and Covid testing and treatment. 275 NE 2nd Street Bend, OR 97701 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Mondays 9am-4:30pm, Thursdays 1pm-4pm at The Lighthouse- 275 NE 2nd Street, Bend, OR 97701 Fridays 10am-noon at the East end of Antler Avenue, Redmond, OR (541) 383-3005 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 383-3005 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in FEES: No fee at time of service. Accepts OHP and most private insurance. Sliding scale fee available. DOCUMENTS: Photo ID, if available LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Deschutes County Services: Mobile Health Care If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
